subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hearst estate in Pleasanton, 1912-10-14
subcodes.first_line: What conforms to the divine decree will be realized. In addition, good intentions and sound thoughts attract confirmations.
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه با تقدیرات موافقت نماید تحقق می یابد و علاوه نیت خیر و حسن تدبیر جاذب تأیید است
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @effort; striving, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of imagination; thought; right intention
